channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: U.S.-India Insight: Indian States China + 1 Strategy: Aim Lower to go Bigger
item.description: State governments have critical roles to play in helping India build a better business environment. In 2025, most state policies focus on specific sectors like electronics or data centers.

item.title: North Korean UAVs at Panghyon
item.description: Recent imagery shows two types of North Korean UAVs at Panghyon Airbase, observed together for the first time at the location.
